content.en:
Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned to the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

At this time, the Eternal Ancient Demon City was full of discussions about this battle.

Of course.

Ye Tian was not interested in paying attention anymore and began to practice retreat.

In the following days, Ye Tian made every effort to comprehend the golden text on the other side, and found a way to obtain treasures that would help him break through.

Unfortunately, such treasures are very rare, after all, even at auction, there are few treasures that can help break through the bottleneck.

That kind of treasure, most of the bone transformation realm has been obtained, and they will not be sent to the auction, unless it is useless to themselves.

Time flies.

"The Golden Script on the Other Side is many times more complex than the Ancient Golden Script, and it is difficult to comprehend it than the Haven on the Other Side. "

After Ye Tian realized it for a period of time, he realized it like this.

But as long as you are willing to spend time, you can still understand these golden texts on the other side.

After a long time.

Ye Tian finally comprehended the first golden text on the other side.

Subsequently, he began to comprehend the second Golden Text.

In this way, one after another Jin Wen on the other side was thoroughly understood by Ye Tianshen.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian understood all the thirty-six golden texts on the other side.

After understanding these golden texts on the other side, Ye Tian found that those ancient golden texts were too pediatric, as if they could be understood at a glance.

And.

He could now easily create a Supreme Ancient Bone Technique.

Of course.

Now the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique is not of much help to him, but the Golden Text on the other side is not only useful for creating the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique!

Blend into the weapon and forge the divine weapon on the other side, which is also a use.

Besides.

Ye Tian also felt that the Jin Wen on the other side had more terrifying mysteries, but he was now in contact with too few Jin Wen on the other side, so he didn't know the true value of the Jin Wen on the other side.

The value of the golden text on the other side is far greater than that of the black text on the other side, and there must be something he doesn't understand.

It's just that even if the other bone transformation realms knew about this mystery, they wouldn't tell him.

The years that followed.

He began to use these golden inscriptions on the other side to create the forging technique that forged the divine soldiers on the other side.

Any piece of the Divine Weapon of the Other Shore is extremely precious, and if you want to create the forging technique of the Divine Soldier of the Other Shore, you must have a Divine Weapon of the Other Shore as a reference.

"Eternal Ancient Demon City wants to buy a Divine Weapon from the other side, but it is too difficult to buy it at all. "

Ye Tian also asked, and none of the shops would sell the Divine Weapons on the other side.

Because the materials needed by the Divine Soldier on the other side are extremely precious, and the golden inscriptions on the other side are also extremely rare, it is very difficult to understand, so it is very difficult to forge a Divine Soldier on the other side.

Naturally, there is no store in the Eternal Ancient Demon City that will sell the divine weapons on the other side.

"There is no complete Divine Soldier on the other side, but there should still be fragments of the Divine Soldier on the other side. "

Thereupon.

Ye Tian went to find the fragments of the divine soldiers on the other side.

Finally, he found a fragment of the divine weapon on the other side in a special void area trading place in the Eternal Ancient Demon City.

The Bone Transformation Realm that owns this Divine Weapon Fragment on the Other Shore is a sixth-stage Bone Transformation Realm, and the price tag for this Divine Weapon Fragment on the Other Shore is 20,000 Primary Eternal Ancient Gold.

To be honest, it is impossible for an ordinary Bone Transformation Realm to buy a fragment of a divine weapon on the other side.

Because a fragment is not worth much, where are other bone transformation realms willing to buy a fragment!

Whoever buys it is a fool!

"Ten thousand primary-grade eternal gold, I'll buy it!"

Ye Tian said.

"Deal!"

The other party directly agreed.

He marked the price of tens of thousands of primary-grade eternal ancient gold, which was originally to make other bone transformation realms bargain, Ye Tian was willing to pay 10,000 primary-grade eternal ancient gold, and he naturally sold it.

Ye Tian also knew that this fragment was not even worth 10,000 primary-grade eternal ancient gold, but he needed a reference, so this fragment was very valuable to him.

Soon.

They closed the deal.

......

After coming back.

Ye Tian took out this piece of fragment and studied it.

His immeasurable will melted into this fragment and studied it carefully.

"The fragment contains the power of the Golden Script on the other side, and every particle has changed, and there is a fragment of the Golden Script on the other side. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He began to take a closer look, and then continued to experiment with various materials.

Of course.

It is impossible for the materials he took to refine the Divine Weapon on the other side, but there is no problem in taking them out for experiments.

However.

He tried countless times, but without success.

Fail every time!

"There must still be some mystery, I haven't figured it out!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He felt that he had to get a vest to blend in with the big forces to understand, otherwise it would be impossible to create the Divine Weapon Casting Technique on the Other Side with a fragment of the Divine Weapon on the Other Side.

......

Wanlong territorial waters.

Ye Tian was ready to annihilate the Lord of His Blood Fish and the Lord of the Water Inheritance.

As for the vest of Long Yan Tianzu, when the True Dragon Cave Heaven was destroyed, this vest was annihilated.

These forces are too weak to help him, and there is no point in keeping a vest.

In this way, he had several copies of his body free.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to screen forces and decided to join a certain force.

"Behind the Eternal Ancient Demon City is the force of the Ancient Demon Sea, it seems that it does not accept members, and it is unlikely that it wants to join. Eternal Night Pavilion, the sphere of influence is not here, and it is also an internal cultivation genius, they also do not lack primeval-level geniuses, and I don't have any advantages, and it is difficult to join them. "

Ye Tian sifted around and finally decided which force to join.

The land of eternity, the domain of blood, one of the four major forces, Guheng Mountain.

The Bloody Domain is the scope of the Eternal Ancient Demon City, the Eternal Blood Bird, and the Eternal Giant Ape Clan, which is a huge area of the Eternal Beyond Land, and within the scope of this area, there are four major forces.

One of them is Guheng Mountain.

Ancient Heng Mountain, Ancient Demon Sea, True Beast Alliance, Taidu Realm.

These are the four major forces!

Among them, the Taidu Realm is a place similar to the Realm Gap, but the personality is very high, and it has obviously been upgraded again and again, which has become so powerful.

The Taidu Realm will not accept the bone transformation realm from the outside world, and there is no hope for the ancient demon sea, the True Beast Alliance is the strength established by a group of eternal true beasts, and the minimum cultivation recruited is still the eternal true beast cultivated by the seventh bone transformation realm.

Therefore, the most suitable force in the Blood Yan Domain was only Gu Heng Mountain.

He didn't want to leave the Blood Yan Domain too far now, so joining Gu Heng Mountain was undoubtedly the best choice.

Moreover, Gu Heng Mountain is also strong enough, although it is not as good as the Eternal Night Pavilion, it is undoubtedly the top overlord in the Blood Yan Domain.

Furthermore, Gu Heng Mountain will recruit geniuses from the outside world, but only if he has special talents can he hope to be recruited by Gu Heng Mountain.

Otherwise, Gu Hengshan would not have accepted it.
